contact_lookup_status: No named recruiter or contact was visible on the public ILOS Factorial posting checked on 2026-04-12, so the letter uses Hiring Team as the fallback.
availability_override: I am available to start from 26 April 2026 and can work up to 20 hours per week in line with my current student visa.
why_company: What caught my attention about ILOS is that this role combines process implementation, digitalisation, and cross-functional coordination in a renewable-energy environment where good internal workflows clearly matter. I am especially interested in work where documentation, analysis, stakeholder alignment, and continuous improvement directly support real projects and operational execution.
job_description: ILOS Projects GmbH is hiring a working student in Process & Digitalisation in Karlsruhe in hybrid mode. The role supports implementation and improvement of business processes across the organisation, communicates and aligns with stakeholders across business departments, IT, and process owners, prepares presentations and meeting materials in PowerPoint, supports analysis, tracking, and reporting in Excel, assists with dashboards and reports in Power BI, may optionally support simple tools in Power Apps, and contributes to continuous improvement and digitalisation initiatives. The posting asks for an enrolled Bachelor's or Master's student in business administration, information systems, industrial engineering, data analytics, or a comparable field; strong communication and a structured reliable working style; confident use of PowerPoint and Excel; basic exposure to Power BI; interest in process management and digitalisation; analytical skills; proactive hands-on mindset; very good English; and German as an advantage.
requirements: Enrolled Bachelor's or Master's student in business administration, information systems, industrial engineering, data analytics, or a comparable field
Strong communication skills and a structured, reliable working style
Confident handling of Microsoft PowerPoint and Excel
Basic experience with Power BI is helpful
Exposure to Power Apps is an advantage but not required
Interest in process management, digitalisation, and cross-functional collaboration
Good analytical skills and proactive hands-on mindset
Very good English; German is an advantage
cv_about_override: Workflow and digitalisation professional focused on process clarity, stakeholder coordination, reporting support, and structured operational improvement in complex digital environments.
cv_summary_override: Experienced business analysis and operations professional with a strong foundation in documentation, stakeholder alignment, workflow improvement, and structured execution. I have worked across eCommerce, LegalTech, healthcare, and digital operations, with a focus on turning complex operational needs into clearer processes, practical handoffs, and more reliable delivery. This makes me well suited for working student roles that combine process implementation, reporting support, presentations, cross-functional coordination, and digitalisation work.
cover_letter_opening: I am applying for the Process & Digitalisation working student role at ILOS because it combines process implementation, digitalisation support, and cross-functional coordination in a practical operating environment.
cover_letter_body_one: Across business analysis, product delivery, and operations-heavy environments, I have often worked where teams needed clearer documentation, better workflow structure, and stronger coordination between business and operational stakeholders. That has made me comfortable preparing decision-ready materials, tracking work clearly, and supporting implementation efforts that depend on reliable follow-through.
cover_letter_body_two: What makes this role especially relevant for me is the mix of process implementation, stakeholder alignment, reporting support, and continuous improvement. Through my work across marketplace products, regulated onboarding, and healthcare workflow digitization, I have built experience turning complex operational topics into clearer structures, more usable handoffs, and better-documented ways of working. I am confident with PowerPoint and Excel, and while I would not overstate direct Power BI or Power Apps depth, I am comfortable learning practical tools quickly when they serve a clear process need.
cover_letter_motivation: I am particularly interested in ILOS because the company combines process excellence and digitalisation with a renewable-energy context that has clear real-world relevance.
cover_letter_closing: I am available to start from 26 April 2026 and can work up to 20 hours per week in line with my current student visa. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can support your Process & Digitalisation team.
